title: Multi-account AuthMe
description: This is a fork of AuthMe. It adds support for multiple accounts.
body:
# What is this?
This is a fork of AuthMe by axieum (https://github.com/axieum/authme) \
It authenticates you and saves your access/refresh token to an encrypted JSON file (by default, you can make it not encrypt the file). \
So that you can easily switch accounts. \
No need to restart Minecraft anymore!

# How do I use it?
Just click on the lock icon in the top left when you go try to connect to multiplayer servers.
